title: 3M India Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: 3M India Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
3M India Healthcare, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About 3M India Healthcare:
3M India Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare!
